name: Ratchanter
tips: Ratchanter is both a Mage and a Rat — he benefits from Dark Matter buffs (Shady Trade Deal, Dark Matter Stash, Grave Caller) AND can be fetched by To The Ratmobile!'s Rat tutor. He is NOT a promote target for Giant Rat — only Common Rats promote.
Each activation buffs all your other Rats on board and conjures a Common Rat from your deck (if any remain). The more Rats you have, the more value each 2-mana activation provides.
The buff applies to every existing ally Rat, not the newly-conjured one. Magnitude is 1+DM. At Ratchanter DM=3, each of your existing Rats gets +4 🗡️/+4 🤍 per activation.
Ratchanter + Giant Rat is the core Rat engine: conjure Common Rats for board width, and if Giant Rat dies, one of those Common Rats promotes into a fresh 30🗡️/30🤍 Giant Rat.
At 15/30 he's tanky enough to survive most early trades. Protect him in the back row and use him as a Rat factory rather than a frontline fighter.
rulings: Activation costs 2 mana. Buff (Step 1) always fires. Conjure (Step 2) only triggers if at least one Common Rat is in the caster's deck.
The buff explicitly excludes the caster (Ratchanter doesn't buff itself).
Buff magnitude is 1 + Ratchanter's own DM stacks. All three stats (🗡️, max 🤍, current 🤍) increase — the buffed Rats gain usable HP, not just a cap raise.

Conjure goes through the pending_tutor → conjure_deploy flow: caster picks one Common Rat from their deck, then picks an empty tile on their own side to deploy it. The new Rat starts at base stats (no initial buff). Declining deployment sends the Rat to hand instead — if the hand is full (10 cards), it burns to the Exhaust Pile.
